message:
test(bd-18en): add 62 unit tests for oauth.rs authorization server

Cover OAuthServerConfig defaults/debug/clone, ClientType debug/eq/copy,
OAuthClient debug/clone/authenticate public client/redirect URI validation
(non-localhost, IPv6, empty scopes), OAuthClientBuilder debug/empty-id-fails/
no-redirect-fails/multiple-URIs/scopes/description, CodeChallengeMethod
as_str/clone/copy/eq, AuthorizationCode expired/not-expired/validate-plain/
validate-S256/debug/clone, TokenType as_str/debug/clone/copy/eq, OAuthToken
expired/not-expired/debug/clone, TokenResponse serialize with/without optional
fields, AuthorizationRequest/TokenRequest debug/clone, OAuthError all-codes/
debug/clone/std-Error/Into-McpError branches, OAuthServer config-accessor/
public-not-allowed/list-clients/authorize errors (unsupported type, invalid
redirect, invalid scope, unknown client), token errors (unsupported grant,
missing params, verifier too short), full S256 flow, code-already-used,
validate nonexistent, unregister revokes tokens, cleanup_expired,
OAuthServerStats default/debug/clone, helper function edge cases. Server
crate: 865 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
